# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateDashboardReport($pdo) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                r.*,
                u.username,
                u.email,
                c.category_name,
                s.status_name
            FROM reports r
            LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN statuses s ON r.status_id = s.id
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    $types = '';
    
    if (!empty($_POST['status']) && is_array($_POST['status'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['status']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['status'] as $status) {
            $params[] = $status;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['category']) && is_array($_POST['category'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['category']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['category'] as $category) {
            $params[] = $category;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['user_id'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.user_id = ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['user_id'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) >= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_from'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) <= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_to'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['amount_min'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.amount >= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['amount_min'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['amount_max'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.amount <= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['amount_max'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['search'])) {
        $sql .= " AND (r.title LIKE ? OR r.description LIKE ? OR u.username LIKE ? OR u.email LIKE ?)";
        $searchTerm = '%' . $_POST['search'] . '%';
        $params[] = $searchTerm;
        $params[] = $searchTerm;
        $params[] = $searchTerm;
        $params[] = $searchTerm;
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['priority']) && is_array($_POST['priority'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['priority']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.priority IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['priority'] as $priority) {
            $params[] = $priority;
        }
    }
    
    $orderBy = 'r.created_at';
    $orderDir = 'DESC';
    
    if (!empty($_POST['order_by'])) {
        $allowedColumns = ['created_at', 'amount', 'title', 'status_id', 'category_id', 'priority'];
        if (in_array($_POST['order_by'], $allowedColumns)) {
            $orderBy = 'r.' . $_POST['order_by'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['order_dir']) && in_array(strtoupper($_POST['order_dir']), ['ASC', 'DESC'])) {
        $orderDir = strtoupper($_POST['order_dir']);
    }
    
    $sql .= " ORDER BY $orderBy $orderDir";
    
    $limit = 100;
    $offset = 0;
    
    if (!empty($_POST['limit']) && is_numeric($_POST['limit']) && $_POST['limit'] > 0) {
        $limit = min((int)$_POST['limit'], 1000);
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['page']) && is_numeric($_POST['page']) && $_POST['page'] > 0) {
        $offset = ((int)$_POST['page'] - 1) * $limit;
    }
    
    $sql .= " LIMIT ? OFFSET ?";
    $params[] = $limit;
    $params[] = $offset;
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    return $results;
}

function getReportSummary($pdo) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                COUNT(*) as total_count,
                SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount,
                MIN(r.amount) as min_amount,
                MAX(r.amount) as max_amount,
                s.status_name,
                COUNT(r.id) as status_count
            FROM reports r
            LEFT JOIN statuses s ON r.status_id = s.id
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($_POST['status']) && is_array($_POST['status'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['status']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['status'] as $status) {
            $params[] = $status;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['category']) && is_array($_POST['category'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['category']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['category'] as $category) {
            $params[] = $category;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['user_id'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.user_id = ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['user_id'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) >= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_from'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) <= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_to'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['amount_min'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.amount >= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['amount_min'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['amount_max'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.amount <= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['amount_max'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['search'])) {
        $sql .= " AND (r.title LIKE ? OR r.description LIKE ?)";
        $searchTerm = '%' . $_POST['search'] . '%';
        $params[] = $searchTerm;
        $params[] = $searchTerm;
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['priority']) && is_array($_POST['priority'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['priority']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.priority IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['priority'] as $priority) {
            $params[] = $priority;
        }
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY s.status_name";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    $summary = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    return $summary;
}

function getCategoryBreakdown($pdo) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                c.category_name,
                COUNT(r.id) as report_count,
                SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount
            FROM reports r
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($_POST['status']) && is_array($_POST['status'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['status']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['status'] as $status) {
            $params[] = $status;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['category']) && is_array($_POST['category'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['category']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['category'] as $category) {
            $params[] = $category;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) >= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_from'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) <= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_to'];
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY c.category_name ORDER BY total_amount DESC";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    $breakdown = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    return $breakdown;
}

function getTimeSeriesData($pdo) {
    $groupBy = 'DATE';
    $dateFormat = '%Y-%m-%d';
    
    if (!empty($_POST['time_grouping'])) {
        switch ($_POST['time_grouping']) {
            case 'hour':
                $groupBy = 'HOUR';
                $dateFormat = '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00';
                break;
            case 'day':
                $groupBy = 'DATE';
                $dateFormat = '%Y-%m-%d';
                break;
            case 'week':
                $groupBy = 'WEEK';
                $dateFormat = '%Y-W%v';
                break;
            case 'month':
                $groupBy = 'MONTH';
                $dateFormat = '%Y-%m';
                break;
            case 'year':
                $groupBy = 'YEAR';
                $dateFormat = '%Y';
                break;
            default:
                $groupBy = 'DATE';
                $dateFormat = '%Y-%m-%d';
        }
    }
    
    $sql = "SELECT 
                DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, ?) as time_period,
                COUNT(r.id) as report_count,
                SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount
            FROM reports r
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [$dateFormat];
    
    if (!empty($_POST['status']) && is_array($_POST['status'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['status']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.status_id IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['status'] as $status) {
            $params[] = $status;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['category']) && is_array($_POST['category'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['category']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['category'] as $category) {
            $params[] = $category;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) >= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_from'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) <= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_to'];
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY time_period ORDER BY time_period ASC";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    $timeSeries = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    return $timeSeries;
}

function getUserActivityReport($pdo) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                u.id,
                u.username,
                u.email,
                COUNT(r.id) as report_count,
                SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount,
                MAX(r.created_at) as last_report_date
            FROM users u
            LEFT JOIN reports r ON u.id = r.user_id";
    
    $params = [];
    $whereAdded = false;
    
    if (!empty($_POST['status']) && is_array($_POST['status'])) {
        $sql .= " WHERE r.status_id IN (" . str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['status']) - 1) . "?)";
        $whereAdded = true;
        foreach ($_POST['status'] as $status) {
            $params[] = $status;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['category']) && is_array($_POST['category'])) {
        $sql .= $whereAdded ? " AND" : " WHERE";
        $sql .= " r.category_id IN (" . str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['category']) - 1) . "?)";
        $whereAdded = true;
        foreach ($_POST['category'] as $category) {
            $params[] = $category;
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= $whereAdded ? " AND" : " WHERE";
        $sql .= " DATE(r.created_at) >= ?";
        $whereAdded = true;
        $params[] = $_POST['date_from'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= $whereAdded ? " AND" : " WHERE";
        $sql .= " DATE(r.created_at) <= ?";
        $whereAdded = true;
        $params[] = $_POST['date_to'];
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.email";
    $sql .= " HAVING report_count > 0";
    $sql .= " ORDER BY report_count DESC";
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    $userActivity = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    return $userActivity;
}

function exportReportToCSV($pdo) {
    $data = generateDashboardReport($pdo);
    
    header('Content-Type: text/csv');
    header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="report_' . date('Y-m-d_H-i-s') . '.csv"');
    
    $output = fopen('php://output', 'w');
    
    if (!empty($data)) {
        fputcsv($output, array_keys($data[0]));
        
        foreach ($data as $row) {
            fputcsv($output, $row);
        }
    }
    
    fclose($output);
    exit;
}

function getAdvancedReportMetrics($pdo) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                COUNT(DISTINCT r.user_id) as unique_users,
                COUNT(DISTINCT r.category_id) as categories_used,
                COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(r.created_at)) as active_days,
                SUM(CASE WHEN r.status_id = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_count,
                SUM(CASE WHEN r.status_id = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_count,
                SUM(CASE WHEN r.status_id = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_count,
                SUM(CASE WHEN r.priority = 'high' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_priority_count,
                SUM(CASE WHEN r.priority = 'medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as medium_priority_count,
                SUM(CASE WHEN r.priority = 'low' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as low_priority_count
            FROM reports r
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) >= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_from'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND DATE(r.created_at) <= ?";
        $params[] = $_POST['date_to'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['category']) && is_array($_POST['category'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($_POST['category']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND r.category_id IN ($placeholders)";
        foreach ($_POST['category'] as $category) {
            $params[] = $category;
        }
    }
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    $metrics = $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    return $metrics;
}

?>
